title: Blackspur BB-MT110 Mains Tester and Digital Circuit Tester Set
features: Set contains a 140mm length mains tester (BB-MT100) and a digital circuit tester (BB-CT102)
Mains tester range 100-250V and Circuit tester range 12-250V
Used in both AC and DC condition
